title: ARCHIVED – Notice – Some online services will be unavailable March 8, 2014 - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED – Notice – Some online services will be unavailable March 8, 2014

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
March 7, 2014 — The following online services will be unavailable between 7:00 a.m. and 2:00 p.m. (EST) on Saturday, March 8 2014, in order to perform system maintenance:
- Access to Information and Privacy online request service
- Check your application status tool
- Online payment service
- Fees receipt order system
- Residence Calculator
We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. These services will be available after 2:00 p.m.
All other e-services such as online applications will still be running.
If you are still encountering issues after the scheduled outage time, please let us know .
Subscribe to receive IRCC news
